indices.note: US markets closed for June 30 — end of Q2 2026. Best quarter since 2020.

commodities.note: Oil prices set for steep monthly drop. US-Iran talks in Doha. Brent expected $75-80 year-end per CIBC.

fx.note: Yen at weakest vs USD in 4 decades. Market watching for BOJ intervention.

news_headlines.title: Chip Stocks' Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
Stocks Fluctuate at End of Best Quarter Since 2020
Citadel Securities Sees Retail Crowd Buying Dips at Record Pace
Yen's Slide Puts Market on Lookout for Japan's Next Red Line
Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years
Oil prices set for steep monthly drop as Trump, Iran issue mixed messages
White House AI crackdown opens door for Chinese model makers
AeroVironment skyrockets 21% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
Oil Supply Won't Come Back as Quickly as Expected, Babin Says

summary: Q2 2026 closes: US stocks' best quarter since 2020. Chip stocks had best quarter ever despite late volatility. Small caps best H1 in 35 years. Crypto subdued at $2.16T with Extreme Fear sentiment. Oil under pressure from US-Iran talks (WTI $70.39, Brent $72.83). Yen at 40-year low vs USD. Retail investors buying dips at record pace per Citadel Securities.
